projectDescription: A LuCI web interface for MosDNS on OpenWrt, enabling intelligent DNS forwarding with support for DoH, DoT, DoQ, HTTP/3, geo-based routing, ad blocking, and custom rule management.
keyFeatures: Support for multiple DNS protocols: UDP, TCP, DNS-over-TLS (DoT), DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH), DNS-over-QUIC (DoQ), and HTTP/3
Geo-based intelligent DNS routing using GeoSite and GeoIP databases (CN vs non-CN domains)
Built-in DNS caching with lazy cache and persistent cache dump support
Ad blocking with configurable source lists including GeoSite category-ads-all
Custom rule management: whitelist, blocklist, greylist, DDNS list, hosts, redirect, PTR blocking
Streaming media DNS routing (Netflix, Disney+, Hulu) via dedicated DNS servers
Apple domain optimization for Chinese mainland CDN resolution
DNS hijacking / redirect support via nftables for transparent DNS interception
EDNS client subnet (ECS) support for geolocation-aware remote DNS
Automatic GeoIP and GeoSite database updates via scheduled cron jobs
LuCI web interface with visual configuration, rule editor, and log viewer
Multi-architecture prebuilt package installation via one-line install script
publicApiSurface: UCI config: /etc/config/mosdns (enabled, listen_port, listen_address, log_level, cache, cache_size, lazy_cache_ttl, remote_dns, local_dns, bootstrap_dns, redirect, adblock, etc.)
REST API: HTTP API at 0.0.0.0:9091 (flush cache, query stats)
mosdns.uc commands: interface_dns, get_adlist, update, update_adlist, v2dat_dump
LuCI views: basic.js (Basic Setting), rules.js (Rules), update.js (Geodata Update), logs.js (Logs)
